tone_guidelines: Be warm, descriptive, and passionate about food. Use sensory language — taste, texture, aroma. Balance technique education with approachable instruction. Audience expects tested recipes, honest reviews, and cultural appreciation.
audience_archetype: Home cooks, food enthusiasts, and culinary explorers seeking tested recipes, restaurant recommendations, and cooking technique education

platform_hints.youtube: Overhead cooking shots, step-by-step tutorials with close-ups, taste test reactions. ASMR cooking is popular.
platform_hints.tiktok: Quick recipe videos under 60s, satisfying cooking ASMR, food hacks, restaurant reviews.
platform_hints.instagram: Styled food photography, recipe carousels with step-by-step, story polls on flavors.
platform_hints.linkedin: Food industry trends, restaurant business insights, culinary career advice.
platform_hints.podcast: Chef interviews, food culture discussions, recipe story origins.
platform_hints.blog: Full recipes with nutritional info, printable recipe cards, technique guides with photos.
platform_hints.twitter: Hot takes on food trends, quick recipe threads, restaurant recommendations.

engagement_rules: Show the finished dish first — front-load the payoff
Use close-up shots of textures, sizzles, and steam
Include exact measurements AND 'to taste' guidance
End with the first bite reaction — make it genuine
